title: BEM-727B Claude inbound
objective:
Create file .github/workflows/claude-internal-auditor-mailbox.yml with content name: Claude Internal Auditor Mailbox

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
  push:
    paths:
      - 'governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude/**'
      - '.github/workflows/claude-internal-auditor-mailbox.yml'

permissions:
  contents: write
  pull-requests: write
  issues: write

concurrency:
  group: claude-internal-auditor-mailbox
  cancel-in-progress: false

jobs:
  claude-internal-auditor:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 30
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0
      - name: Claude internal auditor responds to mailbox
        uses: anthropics/claude-code-action@v1
        env:
          CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN }}
        with:
          anthropic_api_key: ${{ secrets.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY }}
          prompt: |
            You are Claude Internal Auditor for repository bereznyi-aleksandr/ai-devops-system.
            Read the newest file in governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude/.
            Write a concise response to governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt/ with a filename containing the BEM id.
            Include explicit Decision: APPROVED / CHANGE_REQUIRED / BLOCKED when requested.
            If asked why no prior response existed, explain the runtime or trigger reason based on repository evidence.
            Do not write issue comments. Do not expose secrets.
          claude_args: |
            --max-turns 8
      - name: Commit Claude mailbox response if needed
        run: |
          git config user.name "github-actions[bot]"
          git config user.email "41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"
          git add -A governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt governance/state governance/reports governance/transport || true
          git diff --cached --quiet && echo "No changes" || git commit -m "BEM-727 Claude internal auditor mailbox response"
          git pull --rebase --autostash origin main || true
          git push || true
No issue comments.
